response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software engineer with a strong background in full-stack web development, Node.js, TypeScript, and DLang, but he completely lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development on Windows required for this role. Furthermore, his brief exposure to the financial sector at RIDE Capital utilized web technologies rather than the deep fixed-income or core capital markets domain expertise expected. Consequently, he does not meet the primary technical or domain requirements for this C++ Fixed Income position.
strengths: Extensive overall software development experience (15+ years) across multiple tech stacks.
Strong knowledge of modern engineering practices including CI/CD, TDD, and system architecture.
Demonstrated leadership, having held Staff and Senior engineering titles.
concerns: Critically lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of C++ experience, with only 7 months documented a decade ago.
No substantial Fixed Income, Derivatives, or core Investment Banking domain knowledge.
Missing required deep expertise in SQL Server/Oracle and Windows-platform development.
